channel.title: GitHub Red Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Red in GitHub

item.title: red/red
item.description: Red is a next-generation programming language strongly inspired by Rebol, but with a broader field of usage thanks to its native-code compiler, from system programming to high-level scripting and cross-platform reactive GUI, while providing modern support for concurrency, all in a zero-install, zero-config, single ~1MB file!
